workspace.name: Give International
workspace.story: Give International partners with Ugandan communities to improve health care access, education, and livelihoods through sustainable, locally-led projects.

projects.title: Uganda Health Care Initiative
projects.description: Partnership-based medical outreaches and surgical support for children in rural districts.

projects.title: Education Sponsorships
projects.description: Scholarships and mentorship for students transitioning to secondary and vocational education.

projects.title: Economic Empowerment Groups
projects.description: Village savings and loan associations that help families build resilience.

recipients_category.name: Student Sponsorships
recipients_category.description: Recipients and youth receiving educational support.

recipients.story: Maria excels in science and dreams of becoming a nurse through Give International's scholarship program.

recipients.needs: Orthopedic surgery follow-up and school support.
recipients.story: Samuel joined the health care initiative after a successful corrective surgery and is now back in school.

news.title: Volunteer Team Returns to Uganda
news.excerpt: Skilled volunteers completed medical screenings across three clinics.
news.body: A multidisciplinary volunteer team from Canada joined Ugandan clinicians to deliver screenings, surgeries, and training in three partner clinics.

news.title: New Savings Groups Launch
news.body: Give International launched two new village savings groups to help caregivers fund education and health expenses.

pdfs.description: Volunteer preparation guide sourced from the public documents listing.
